source_file: 6 Must Visit Places in Italy 🇮🇹👇1. Amalfi Coast 🍋– A picture-perfect stretch of coastline La.mp4
caption: 6 Must Visit Places in Italy 🇮🇹👇1. Amalfi Coast 🍋– A picture-perfect stretch of coastline La
on_screen_text: 6 Must-Visit Places in Italy! You HAVE to See in Your Lifetime! one Amalfi Coast two Rome three Cinque Terre four Venice five Sardinia six Dolomites
visual_description: The video presents six must-visit places in Italy, beginning with the stunning coastal town of Positano on the Amalfi Coast. It then transitions to iconic landmarks in Rome like the Colosseum and Castel Sant'Angelo, followed by the colorful cliffside villages of Cinque Terre. Next, the video highlights the scenic canals and gondolas of Venice, then showcases the clear blue waters and beaches of Sardinia. Finally, it concludes with breathtaking views of the snow-capped Dolomites mountains, capturing a diverse range of Italian landscapes.
setting: Various locations across Italy, including coastal towns, cities, and mountains, primarily during the daytime.
vibe: Inspirational, picturesque, adventurous, travel-focused, beautiful, inviting.

source_file: Ecom founders- real factories vs. trading companiesI use an app called 企查查 (QiChaCha) as a quick.mp4
caption: Ecom founders- real factories vs. trading companiesI use an app called 企查查 (QiChaCha) as a quick
transcript: factory or a trading company. There's an app that you can download called QiChaCha. It is in Chinese and you'd have to insert the correct Chinese name of the supplier that you're speaking with which you find the company description. Every company that's registered in China, there's a couple of key details which are public for every single company that's listed. Typically for manufacturers, you'll have many, many references within that company scope to manufacturing, production, may perhaps mention of raw materials. For a trading company, it's typically different. Online sales, retail, wholesale. A lot more to do with the sale of the actual products rather than the manufacturer of the product. So that's one of my quick rules where I'm tossing up is this supplier factory, a real manufacturer or just another trading company.

source_file: I feel like by random I found a piece of gold in the forest and now I’m sitting with it alone, a.mp4
caption: I feel like by random I found a piece of gold in the forest and now I’m sitting with it alone, a
on_screen_text: I came to Thailand in search of a spiritual experience and after two Vipassana meditation retreats I came to a farm run by a former Buddhist monk At first, I thought I would just volunteering here for a while Weeks I experienced calm farm living, gardening, and delicious food Time passed, people come and go By then, through attending to his teachings, I saw the futility of seeking outward So I stayed I continued do meditation he taught me, listening Buddha stories and getting answers for all my questions And then it suddenly hit me... I found a TEACHER! A real teacher, as I dreamed And now, after four months of learning and practicing I can say with confidence that here you can truly change perception of yourself understand your nature and come closer to something divine... If you, like me, are on a spiritual path and have been searching for a teacher, someone who can guide you on the path to awakening, someone who teaches from direct, deep understanding... I found one! And you can come!
visual_description: The video follows a person's spiritual journey in Thailand, starting with their travels through lush landscapes and visits to a temple. It then transitions to a serene farm run by a former Buddhist monk, showcasing calm farm life, gardening, and freshly prepared, delicious food. The individual is seen meditating, reflecting, and enjoying nature, culminating in a profound realization of finding a spiritual teacher and inviting others to join this experience at "Happy Healing Home."
setting: Rural Thailand, mostly outdoors at various times of day, including a road, a temple, a farm, a garden, and a wooden shelter.
searchable_text:

transcript: What are you doing? I just thought I'd go ahead and head out. What's in your bag? Nothing. What the heck? Is that my baby in there? You can't keep her. Why not? She's my baby. Get out of my way.
on_screen_text: POV: your bestie comes to visit
visual_description: A woman in a hat and sweatpants stands confused in her modern home. Her best friend, wearing a denim jacket and sunglasses, walks past her carrying a large pink bag with heart cutouts. The first woman asks what's in the bag, and it's revealed to contain her baby. The best friend then pushes her away and runs out of the house and down a garden path with the baby in the bag, waving goodbye as she flees.
setting: Inside a modern house and outside in a garden, during the daytime
